message:
spi: mchp-pci1xxx: Fix a possible null pointer dereference in pci1xxx_spi_probe

In function pci1xxxx_spi_probe, there is a potential null pointer that may be caused by a failed memory allocation by the function devm_kzalloc. Hence, a null pointer check needs to be added to prevent null pointer dereferencing later in the code.

ASoC: qcom: lpass: Fix null pointer dereference in platform probe

Add NULL check after devm_kzalloc for drvdata allocation.

ice: fix use-before-initialization in ice_set_fc

Ensure pcaps is assigned before use on all paths.

net: fix memory leak in device probe path

Add missing devm_kfree or error path cleanup.
crypto: fix double free in error handling path
